arts.ttl: Lazio’s Romagnoli Suspended for One Match After Red Card Against Juventus
Lazio Defender Receives One-Match Ban for His Dismissal Against Juventus
arts.sum: Lazio defender Alessio Romagnoli has been slapped with a one-match ban after receiving his marching orders in last weekend’s Serie A clash against Juventus, reports Il Corriere dello Sport. The 29-year-old caught the leg of his former Milan teammate Pierre Kalulu with a desperate sliding tackle as the latter was heading towards Ivan Provedel’s goal.
